description: Case style: Black coloured stainless steel round case, analog watchStrap style: Black synthetic strap with a tang claspDial style: Grey dial with red hands, hands have white accentsFeatures: Branding at the 12 hour mark, solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability, screw to reset timeWater resistant up to 5 BAR Warranty: One year from the date of purchase
